This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] neg float16 positive 0D scalar
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test neg float16 actual 0 should be close enough to expected -94.25 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 0 but got 54756
[FAIL] neg float16 negative 0D scalar
